content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently named what was showing up beyond content, and the reads landed at moments that changed the conversation. Turn 2 names the exhaustion underneath the want ('I feel the exhaustion in that') and reads the throwing-everything-at-it as the fight itself. Turn 6 catches the recursive pattern — the voice having opinions about the inability to stop the voice — and pivots from thinking to feeling. Turn 8 catches a specific linguistic signal ('not fixable' vs 'behind') and holds the client there. Turn 10 names the underneath-the-thing moment when it surfaces. Turn 12 explicitly reads the absence of a next-step attached ('the first thing you've said today that didn't have a next step attached to it') — a sharp pattern-level read of the rehearsal/control signature that's been running the whole call. Turn 12 also tracks into the body. Reads precede questions throughout. The coach also implicitly tracks the rehearsing-how-to-say-it / narrating-the-therapy pattern by repeatedly redirecting the client out of meta-commentary back into experience. Specific, timely, AoA-shaped.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the exhaustion under the want; reads the throwing-everything as the fight itself."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Question without an explicit read — moves to content, though purposeful."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the recursive pattern (voice having opinions about inability to stop voice) and distinguishes thinking from feeling."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Specific linguistic read: catches 'not fixable' as distinct from 'behind/struggling' and holds it."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the underneath-the-thing moment and reflects it back without lecturing."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Sharp pattern read — first statement without a next-step attached — and pivots to somatic tracking."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names what just happened ('you didn't fix it, you didn't technique it') — reads the absence of the usual move."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["rehearsing-how-to-say-it", "voice-as-care", "resistance"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-happiness-filter"],
  "notes": "Rehearsing-how-to-say-it is operative even if not named — the coach repeatedly catches the client narrating-the-therapy and redirects to experience. Somatic read in turn 12 is timely and produces the shift."
}
